creator: gekkeprutser@gmail.com
text:
Since Firefox 116.0 it no longer uses libnotify to display notifications through KDE. KDE 5.27.6, FreeBSD 13.2-p1 on amd64

Furthermore, when it displays its native notifications it often hangs completely so I had to turn notifications off. When it hangs the notification box becomes locked in X-Windows (e.g. previous content from another window is shown there). And all firefox windows will be unresponsive.

Things checked:

- About:config alerts.useSystemBackend is set to true (so it should use libnotify)
- libnotify is still installed
- libinotify is also installed
- Don't see anything relevant to this in about:support
